title: Fix RHEL and Fedora builds. Add pytoml fallback and fix setuptools incompatability.

comments.body: Force pushed to add DCO signoffs
Force pushed to add a necessary specfile change that I stashed and forgot to push :(
Force pushed to fix black linting failures

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *gotmax23*, *mgorny* **Once this PR has been reviewed and has the lgtm label**, please assign luap99 for approval. For more information see [the Kubernetes Code Review Process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process). The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@gotmax23 tried a copr build with this PR and el9 builds have failed saying `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'xdg'`. https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/rhcontainerbot/podman-next/build/5559996/ . It failed for f36 too, but f36 doesn't matter much anymore.

🙁. I tested this on rawhide and el8 but not in between. Older versions of setuptools are apparently unable to parse `attr: podman.version.__version__` without actually importing `podman.version`. We could revert https://github.com/containers/podman-py/pull/244/commits/cbc3b46cb7aed954abbc098a542fb6df01ad70ac, but that would make the RHEL `sed`s more complicated and adds unnecessary duplication. Can we just set `version` in setup.cfg manually instead of using `attr`?

``` diff
diff --git a/setup.cfg b/setup.cfg
index 1d33e3e..0c89b66 100644
--- a/setup.cfg
+++ b/setup.cfg
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [metadata]
 name = podman
-version = attr: podman.version.__version__
+version = 4.4.0
 author = Brent Baude, Jhon Honce
 author_email = jhonce@redhat.com
 description = Bindings for Podman RESTful API
```

> slightly_frowning_face. I tested this on rawhide and el8 but not in between. Older versions of setuptools are apparently unable to parse `attr: podman.version.__version__` without actually importing `podman.version`. We could revert [cbc3b46](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/commit/cbc3b46cb7aed954abbc098a542fb6df01ad70ac), but that would make the RHEL `sed`s more complicated and adds unnecessary duplication. Can we just set `version` in setup.cfg manually instead of using `attr`?

I'm cool with anything as long as we have successful builds. Let me know whenever I can retest copr builds.
Well, I wanted to address @lsm5's feedback in this PR, but I guess that can be a follow up.
